title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search covers emerging tools and techniques in a weekly video digest including 3D generation (Pixal3D, AsymFlow), world models (SANA-WM), language models (MiniCPM), video generation (Krea2), speech synthesis (DramaBox), and ChatGPT updates. The episode showcases 20+ AI releases across vision, video, audio, and developer tools.
